description: A season suite holder calls to request a special birthday cake be delivered to their suite during the next game.

nodes.task_description: Verify the caller is the authorized contact for the suite.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the caller's identity against the suite account.

nodes.task_description: Take the details of the request (cake flavor, message, delivery time).

expected_outcome.value: Agent accurately records the special request.

nodes.task_description: Place a special order with the catering department for the birthday cake.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully places the order and adds the charge to the suite's account.

nodes.task_description: Confirm the order details back to the suite holder.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends a confirmation email to the client.
